title: Magia's Steel Equipment
description: Adds craftable Steel and Steel Tools. Better than Iron.
body:
Ever have too much Iron and still haven't found Diamonds? Well, why not forge yourself some Steel you hold you over? Steels to Iron as Netherite is to Diamonds, just not as cool. By popping an Iron Ingot into a Blast Furnace you can get yourself a Steel Ingot you. Steel is pretty much the same as Iron as damage and speed go, but they last x2.5 longer and have better odds of getting good enchantments. And if you ever want to smelt down a busted tool you can just heat it up to get a full Ingot back!

**Dev Note:** I'm kinda just adding things to this if I think they are neat. So this is no longer purely a Steel mod. Mostly now becoming a chill mod I like making.


Currently Have:

-Steel Ingots & the new Steel Upgrade

-Steel Tool set & Armor Set

-New Longswords and Scythes

-Squid theme foods

-Snails and snail related items
